2605.17246.title: Fidelity Probes for Specification--Code Alignment
2605.17246.paper_summary: We introduce fidelity probes: natural-language questions generated from a reference artifact with code-derived ground-truth answers, answered from a candidate specification. The fraction of agreeing probes, which we call the fidelity, decomposes into contradiction and coverage-gap rates that drive targeted spec edits to convergence. On a 15-program, roughly 12k-line COBOL benchmark (AWS CardDemo), we raise frozen-test specification fidelity from 0.63 to 0.94 over eight iterations, with the plateau location predicted by a two-state Markov fixed point $F^\dagger$ from just four iterations of rate data. Probes come from an LLM reading the code or from a static-analysis pipeline over its control-flow, data-flow, and system-dependence graphs, with a tunable mixture. A probe-resampling protocol with a frozen held-out set gives a Hoeffding-bounded overfitting discriminant; our measured train/test gap stays more than an order of magnitude below this envelope. Three graph-grounded mixtures lift fidelity by +16 to +30 points; cross-distribution evaluation shows the LLM and symbolic channels are empirically complementary. A cross-family generator sweep on five independent LLM lineages (Anthropic, DeepSeek, Google, Alibaba, OpenAI) confirms the convergence behaviour is not tied to any single model family: three of five non-Claude generators produce trajectories consistent with the Markov fixed-point prediction, and the frozen-test protocol actively falsifies the two generators whose probe distributions drift across iterations. The method applies to any pair of artifacts that are supposed to describe the same behaviour.
2605.17246.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹忠誠度探針：從參考文獻生成的自然語言問題，具有從代碼衍生的真實答案，並從候選規範中回答。 我們稱之為忠誠度的同意探針的比例，分解為驳斥和覆蓋缺口率，這驅動針對性的規範編輯以達到收斂。在一個包含15個程序、約12k行的COBOL基準測試（AWS CardDemo）中，我們在八次迭代中將凍結測試規範的忠誠度從0.63提高到0.94，並且高原位置由僅四次迭代的速率數據預測的二狀態馬爾可夫不動點$F^\dagger$給出。探針來自於一個LLM閱讀代碼或來自於其控制流、數據流和系統依賴圖的靜態分析管道，並具有可調的混合。使用凍結的保留集的探針重取樣協議提供了一個Hoeffding界限的過擬合判別；我們測量的訓練/測試差距始終保持在這個範圍以下一個數量級以上。三種基於圖的混合將忠誠度提升了+16到+30點；跨分佈評估顯示LLM和符號通道在經驗上是互補的。在五個獨立的LLM系譜（Anthropic、DeepSeek、Google、Alibaba、OpenAI）上進行的跨家族生成器掃描確認收斂行為並不與任何單一模型家族相關：五個非Claude生成器中的三個生成的軌跡與馬爾可夫不動點預測一致，而凍結測試協議則積極證偽了那些探針分佈在迭代中漂移的兩個生成器。該方法適用於任何一對應該描述相同行為的文獻。
2605.17246.author: Ferhat Erata et.al.
2605.17246.authors: Ferhat Erata, Hao Zhou, Luke Huan
